examples: This battle was vividly recorded in the article.
This great battle was vividly recorded in the documentary film.
If only tomorrow on awaking, I could again call all to mind so vividly!

There are actually three Yetnikoffs portrayed in the book, which was co-written--quite vividly--with David Ritz .
